import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'tsr'))
from tsr.system import TSR

class TripoSRModel:
    def __init__(self, ckpt_path, device='cuda'):
        self.device = device
        weight_dir = os.path.dirname(ckpt_path)
        self.model = TSR.from_pretrained(weight_dir, config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
        self.model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
        self.model.to(device)
    
    def predict_views(self, image_pil, cameras):
        scene_codes = self.model([image_pil], device=self.device)
        frames = self.model.render(scene_codes, cameras=cameras, return_type='pil')
        return frames
